ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metabolites" (
  "metabolite_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each metabolite */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metabolite */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the metabolite */,
  "mz" REAL /* Molecular mass of the metabolite (m/z) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metabolite */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* International Chemical Identifier (InChI) key */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* Simplified Molecular Input Line Entry System (SMILES) */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC) name */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metabolite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "metabolite_id" TEXT /* ID of the metabolite the modification is applied to */,
  "modification_name" TEXT /* Name of the modification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., adduct, fragmentation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_metabolite_id FOREIGN KEY ("metabolite_id") REFERENCES metabolites ("metabolite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical result */,
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modification the result is associated with */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) value */,
  "z_score" REAL /* Z-score of the result */,
  "z_score_auc_weighted" REAL /* Z-score AUC weighted value */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was performed */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_results_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_results_modification_id FOREIGN KEY ("modification_id") REFERENCES modifications ("modification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metabolites" (
  "project_metabolite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-metabolite link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metabolite_id" TEXT /* ID of the metabolite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metabolite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metabolites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metabolites_metabolite_id FOREIGN KEY ("metabolite_id") REFERENCES metabolites ("metabolite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., mass spectrometer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the documentation (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "doc_file" TEXT /* File path to the documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
